hero.description: Passionate about frontend and fullstack development, I turn ideas into elegant, high-performance interfaces. React, Node.js & beyond.

about2.title: About
about2.p1: Graduated with a Bachelor's in Web Development in 2023, I am passionate about building interfaces that combine technical performance with a refined user experience.
about2.p2: I thrive in collaborative, agile environments where code quality and continuous improvement are shared priorities.
about2.p3: Outside of code: open source contributor, design & typography, rock climbing.
